home.intro: Al-Qasr Hotel is one of the projects of Al-Rayyan Real Estate and Investment Company, reflecting the values of authentic Palestinian hospitality and distinguished hospitality experiences. Located away from the hustle and bustle of the city center, the hotel offers guests easy access to key facilities and attractions.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Discover our exclusive offers and packages
services.roomsSubtitle: Choose from our selection of comfortable and elegant rooms
services.hallsSubtitle: Host your special events in our elegant and versatile event halls
services.smallHallDesc: Intimate setting with professional meeting facilities and high-speed WiFi. Ideal for business meetings and small gatherings.
services.largeHallDesc: Modern audio-visual equipment, elegant interior design, and flexible seating arrangements. Perfect for weddings and large events.
services.bookHallDesc: Contact us by phone to reserve your event hall and discuss your requirements.
services.packagesSubtitle: Discover our exclusive offers and packages
weddingPoints: Hall reservation at a special and suitable price
Full hall decoration in cooperation with specialized partners
Complete hospitality and service team provided by the hotel
Serving premium drinks and hospitality for the guests
Special and elegant preparations for the wedding night
Complimentary night for the newlyweds in our luxurios suite
services.customDesc: Looking for something specific? Contact us to create a custom package tailored to your needs.
services.restaurantDesc: Savor the flavors of Palestine and international cuisine in our signature restaurant.
services.twinRoomDesc: Comfortable single occupancy room with modern amenities
services.doubleRoomDesc: Spacious room with double bed for couples
services.tripleRoomDesc: Perfect for small families or groups of three
services.quadRoomDesc: Ideal for families with multiple guests
